entry.title: New: GREAT-11(24) Reso 25-214 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
RESOLUTION 25-214, SETTLEMENT AUTHORIZATION: THE ESTATE OF MATTHEW LOUIS PERREIRA, DECEASED, ET AL. VS. PATRICK GEORGE VENTURA; COUNTY OF MAUI; STATE OF HAWAIʻI; ALEXANDER & BALDWIN, LLC; CIVIL 2CCV-22-0000045 (GREAT-11(24))

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
